_fixture_source: DataCaptureRateTable.jsx captureRateData (lines 5-70): station, conductivity, temp, salinity, chlorophyll, oxygenSat, dissolvedOxygen, turbidity, ph, depth, algae, expected, received, rate
_divergences: DataCaptureRateTable uses 'station' for buoy name (line 7) — plan normalizes to 'buoyName'
DataCaptureRateTable uses 'received' for valid/received records (line 19) — plan normalizes to 'validRecords'
DataCaptureRateTable uses 'expected' for total expected (line 18) — plan normalizes to 'totalExpected'
DataCaptureRateTable uses 'rate' as string percentage (line 20) — plan normalizes to 'captureRatePct' (float)
DataCaptureRateTable also shows per-parameter columns (conductivity, temp, etc.) which are sensor averages; these are NOT in the plan's per-buoy data-capture-rate shape — Phase 4 cleanup needed
